name: lrpc-working-rules
description: Route LRPC repo work through the operating-principles and experiment-plan docs before code or doc changes.

interface.shortDescription: Route LRPC changes through the repo operating docs first
interface.longDescription: Use the repo-local working-rules skill to start LRPC code, docs, formulas, and experiment work from the operating-principles and experiment-plan docs before implementing changes.
defaultPrompt: Read the LRPC operating docs, then plan a clean and isolated repo change.
